items.briefing:
A job scam is circulating that targets marketing professionals by impersonating well-known brands to steal Google account credentials. If you or your colleagues receive unsolicited job offers that ask you to sign in with Google or share account details, treat them with caution — even if the opportunity looks legitimate.

Separately, Australia's Essential Eight cybersecurity framework is being retired, which may affect how your organisation meets compliance obligations. Security leaders are also being reminded that, as AI tools make it easier for attackers to find weaknesses, keeping up with basic security practices remains the most effective defence.

**Tip:** If you receive a job offer via email or social media, verify it directly through the company's official website before clicking any links or logging in anywhere.

featured.title: The Essential Eight is being retired, here's what that means for your cyber programme
featured.quote: Australia's cyber security framework is fundamentally changing from checklist-based compliance to broader strategy.
